name: Black-winged Ones
summary: Mysterious winged allies of the swamp cult, which the captured worshipers said had done the ritual killings, coming to them from their immemorial meeting-place in the haunted wood.
description:
The captured worshipers all denied a part in the ritual murders, and averred that the killing had been done by the Black-winged Ones, which had come to them from their immemorial meeting-place in the haunted wood.

Of those mysterious allies no coherent account could ever be gained; they are known only from the prisoners' testimony.

sources.quote: All denied a part in the ritual murders, and averred that the killing had been done by Black-winged Ones which had come to them from their immemorial meeting-place in the haunted wood. But of those mysterious allies no coherent account could ever be gained.
sources.context: Chapter 2, The Tale of Inspector Legrasse
